en.extract:
The fine-banded woodpecker (Campethera taeniolaema)  is a species of bird in the family Picidae.
two subspecies are recognised :

taeniolaema : Albertine Rift montane forests
hausburgi : East African montane forests yellow underparts


References

International Ornithological Congress (July 25, 2020). "IOC World Bird List". Retrieved July 25, 2020.

The '''fine-banded woodpecker''' ('''''Campethera taeniolaema''''')  is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Picidae]].

two subspecies are recognised :
* ''taeniolaema'' : [[Albertine Rift montane forests]]
* ''hausburgi'' : [[East African montane forests]] ''yellow underparts''

zh.extract:
绿背斑啄木鸟（学名：Campethera taeniolaema）是啄木鸟科绿背斑啄木鸟属的一个种，发现于刚果东部到肯尼亚与坦桑尼亚等地。


参考资料

世界鸟类学家联合会. IOC World Bird List. 2020-07-25  [2020-07-25]. （原始内容存档于2020-04-23）.
